name: 11_module_form_terms_ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms_old
statement:
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms_old' AS catalog_name, 'module' AS source_table, ModuleName AS matched_value, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms_old`.dbo.module
WHERE Deleted = false
  AND lower(coalesce(ModuleName, '') || ' ' || coalesce(Name, '') || ' ' || coalesce(Comments, '')) RLIKE 'omcs|aid|retina|dash|camera|video|gps|jet|fan|dtims|telemetry|vehicle|alarm|as-built|geojson|handover|ai'
GROUP BY ModuleName
UNION ALL
SELECT 'ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms_old' AS catalog_name, 'formfield' AS source_table, Name AS matched_value, COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM `ext_mssql_asset_vision_ven_rms_old`.dbo.formfield
WHERE Deleted = false
  AND lower(coalesce(Name, '') || ' ' || coalesce(Value, '')) RLIKE 'omcs|aid|retina|dash|camera|video|gps|jet|fan|dtims|telemetry|vehicle|alarm|as-built|geojson|handover|ai'
GROUP BY Name
ORDER BY row_count DESC
LIMIT 200

error.message:
